reason: This tweet is a general emotional statement about relationships and time, with no ISIS-related content. It roughly translates to 'Get close to those you love, remove their fear and tiredness. They might leave you first, or maybe you'll leave them. #TimeIsStealing'
original_post: قرب من كل اللى حببهم ، شيل عنهم خوفهم و تعبهم ممكن يسيبوك هما الاول ؛ او يمكن انت اللى تسبهم #الوقت_بيسرقنا
